---
title: "compute_vertex_normals"
generated: true
description: "Unit per-vertex normals from a triangle mesh."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.sparse.mesh`](../nitrix-sparse-mesh.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:compute_vertex_normals -->
```python
compute_vertex_normals(vertices: Float[Array, 'n_vertices 3'], faces: Int[Array, 'n_faces 3']) -> Float[Array, 'n_vertices 3']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:compute_vertex_normals -->
Unit per-vertex normals from a triangle mesh.

Each face contributes its (un-normalised) cross-product normal
`(v1 - v0) x (v2 - v0)` -- whose magnitude is twice the triangle
area, so larger faces weight more -- scattered onto its three
vertices; the per-vertex sum is then L2-normalised.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:compute_vertex_normals -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `vertices` | `Float` | `n_vertices` × `3` | — | `(n_vertices, 3)` coordinates. |
| `faces` | `Int` | `n_faces` × `3` | — | `(n_faces, 3)` vertex indices. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `n_vertices` × `3`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:compute_vertex_normals -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n_vertices` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `3` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n_faces` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
